%22%3Blet%20n%3De%3Bif(t)%7Bconst%20e%3D%60(%24%7Bt%7D)%60%2Ca%3Dn.lastIndexOf(e)%3B-1!%3D%3Da%26%26(n%3Dn.slice(0%2Ca)%2Bn.slice(a%2Be.length))%7Dreturn%20n.replace(%2F%5C%5Cs%2B%2Fg%2C%5C%22%20%5C%22).trim()%7Dfunction%20f(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Blet%20a%3De.de%7C%7C%5C%22%5C%22%2Cs%3De.en%7C%7C%5C%22%5C%22%3Bif(t)%7Bconst%20e%3D%60%20(%24%7Bt%7D)%60%3Ba.includes(%60(%24%7Bt%7D)%60)%7C%7C(a%2B%3De)%2Cs.includes(%60(%24%7Bt%7D)%60)%7C%7C(s%2B%3De)%7Dreturn%7Bde%3Aa%2Cen%3As%2Callergen%3At%7C%7C%5C%22%5C%22%2Cmono%3A!!e.mono%2Canchored%3A!!n%7D%7Dfunction%20b(e)%7Breturn-1!%3D%3D(e%7C%7C%5C%22%5C%22).replace(%2F%5C%5C(%5B%5E)%5D*%5C%5C)%2Fg%2C%5C%22%5C%22).indexOf(%5C%22%2F%5C%22)%7Dfunction%20y(e%2Ct%3D%7B%7D)%7Bif(!e)return%7Bde%3A%5C%22%5C%22%2Cen%3A%5C%22%5C%22%2Craw%3A%5C%22%5C%22%2Cconfidence%3A0%2CsubScores%3A%7Banchor%3A0%2Cpurity%3A0%2Ccourse%3A0%2Ccoverage%3A0%7D%2Clabel%3A%5C%22fallback%5C%22%2Cnotes%3A%5B%5D%7D%3Bconst%7Btext%3An%2Cnotes%3Aa%7D%3Dfunction(e)%7Blet%20t%3De%2Cn%3D%5B%5D%3Bt%3Dt.replace(%2F%5C%5C((%5BA-Z%5D(%3F%3A%5C%5C%2F%5BA-Z%5D)%2B)%5C%5C)%2Fg%2C(e%2Ct)%3D%3E%5C%22(%5C%22%2Bt.replace(%2F%5C%5C%2F%2Fg%2C%5C%22%5C%22)%2B%5C%22)%5C%22)%2Ct%3Dt.replace(%2F%5C%5C%2F(%5BA-Z%5D%7B1%2C8%7D)%5C%5C)%2Fg%2C%5C%22(%241)%5C%22)%3Bconst%20a%3Dt.match(%2FAchtung%20%C3%84nderung%2Fgi)%3Ba%26%26a.forEach(e%3D%3E%7Bn.push(e.trim())%2Ct%3Dt.replace(e%2C%5C%22%20%5C%22)%7D)%3Blet%20s%3Dt.split(%2F%20%7B6%2C%7D%2F)%3Bif(s.length%3E1)%7Blet%20e%3Ds%5Bs.length-1%5D%2Ca%3D%2F!!!%7C!%7B3%2C%7D%2F.test(e)%2Ci%3D%2F%5BA-Z%C3%84%C3%96%C3%9C%5D%7B6%2C%7D%2F.test(e)%2Cr%3D%2FACHTUNG%7CAchtung%7C%C3%84nderung%7CABHOLUNG%7CWERKSRESTAURANT%2Fi.test(e)%2Cl%3D!(e.includes(%5C%22%20%2F%20%5C%22)%7C%7C(o%3De.replace(%2F%5B()%5D%2Fg%2C%5C%22%5C%22)%2C%5C%22string%5C%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20o%26%26o%26%26%2F%5E%5BA-Z%5D(%5C%5Cs*%2C%3F%5C%5Cs*%5BA-Z%5D)*%24%2F.test(o.trim())))%3B(a%26%26i%7C%7Ca%26%26r%7C%7Ci%26%26r%7C%7Cl%26%26r)%26%26(n.push(e.trim())%2Ct%3Dt.substring(0%2Ct.lastIndexOf(e)).
